lines: Reka nshim’ Umwami Yesu Kuko yankunze rwose :
Yarampinduye mb' umwana, Ngo tubane mw ijuru.
Reka nshim' Umwami Yesu Ko yamvanye mu byaha; None ho, mfit' amahoro
Mur'iyi si dutuyemo Yuzuy' uburiganya, Ntabwo yabasha guhaza Iby' imitim'
Kand' Umwuka wawe wera,Abamuhawe bose, Ni W' ujy' abazinukisha Kwifuz' i
Ujye wirukan’ ubwenge Bwa Satan' anzanira Bwo kuntandukanya nawe, Isoko
Yemw' ababyawe n'lmana,Mujye muhirimbana, Mugere ku Musaraba, Mubone
Yes' amaz’ imyaka myinshi Ajy'atwihanganira; Nimuze, dusig' ab'isi, Babone
Mwe kujya muvuga Yesu,Uwo mwumvany' a bandi; Mujye mumureb’ ubwanyu, Ari ku Musaraba.
Mwe kujya mukebaguza No gusubir' inyuma Mu byo mwahozemo
